import requests
import json

# Test all endpoints with the running server
base_url = 'http://127.0.0.1:5001'

print('=== COMPREHENSIVE API TEST ===\n')

# Test 1: Health check
print('1. Health Check:')
try:
    r = requests.get(f'{base_url}/health', timeout=5)
    print(f'   Status: {r.status_code}')
    print(f'   Response: {json.dumps(r.json(), indent=2)}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'   Error: {e}')

print('\n2. Network Status:')
try:
    r = requests.get(f'{base_url}/status', timeout=10)
    print(f'   Status: {r.status_code}')
    data = r.json()
    print(f'   Network: {data.get(\"network\")}')
    print(f'   Current Slot: {data.get(\"current_slot\")}')
    print(f'   Node Count: {data.get(\"node_count\")}')
    current_slot = data.get('current_slot', 0)
except Exception as e:
    print(f'   Error: {e}')
    current_slot = 429406000

print('\n3. Account Details:')
try:
    r = requests.get(f'{base_url}/account/11111111111111111111111111111111', timeout=10)
    print(f'   Status: {r.status_code}')
    print(f'   Response: {json.dumps(r.json(), indent=2)}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'   Error: {e}')

print('\n4. Program Accounts:')
try:
    r = requests.get(f'{base_url}/program/Vote111111111111111111111111111111111111111/accounts?limit=3', timeout=15)
    print(f'   Status: {r.status_code}')
    data = r.json()
    print(f'   Total Accounts: {data.get(\"total_accounts\")}')
    print(f'   Returned: {len(data.get(\"accounts\", []))}')
    print(f'   First Account: {data.get(\"accounts\", [{}])[0].get(\"pubkey\", \"N/A\") if data.get(\"accounts\") else \"N/A\"}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'   Error: {e}')

print('\n5. Block Details:')
try:
    test_slot = current_slot - 50
    r = requests.get(f'{base_url}/block/{test_slot}', timeout=10)
    print(f'   Status: {r.status_code}')
    if r.status_code == 200:
        data = r.json()
        print(f'   Block Hash: {data.get(\"blockhash\", \"N/A\")[:20]}...')
        print(f'   Block Height: {data.get(\"block_height\")}')
    else:
        print(f'   Response: {r.text[:100]}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'   Error: {e}')

print('\n6. 404 Error Test (Invalid Block):')
try:
    r = requests.get(f'{base_url}/block/999999999', timeout=10)
    print(f'   Status: {r.status_code}')
    print(f'   Response: {r.json()}')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'   Error: {e}')

print('\n=== TEST COMPLETE ===')
